reviews.comment:
Pedí un café con leche y la tasa fría y el vaso de agua venia bien porque es gasificada no la sacaron de la canilla pero el vaso roto

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a coffee with milk, and the cup was cold. The glass of water was fine because it was carbonated; they didn't take it from the tap, but the glass was broken.

reviews.comment:
Me robaron.. me hicieron que cargaron nafta. Me cobraron y en realidad no me cargaron nada.. pésimo..  ladrones.. una playera.. pague con la App. Nunca me cargaron nafta.. una ver

(Translated by Google)
I was robbed. They pretended to fill up my tank. They charged me, but they didn't actually fill it up. Terrible. Thieves. A gas station attendant. I paid with the app. They never actually filled my tank. Once.
